message:
fix(codegen): Parameter renames override func_local_vars in expressions

Zero-capture closure parameters are renamed to __m{id}_p_{name} to avoid
shadowing outer scope variables. The var_renames map stores this, but
func_local_vars was short-circuiting the lookup before checking var_renames.

Now parameter renames (__m*_p_* and __m*_v_*) take precedence over the
func_local_vars check, so 'cls' correctly resolves to '__m58_p_cls' in
the generated code.
